SkinningTracker installation

1. Extract the SkinningTracker folder from this zip.
2. Copy the SkinningTracker folder into your World of Warcraft AddOns directory.
3. Typical path:
   World of Warcraft\_retail_\Interface\AddOns\SkinningTracker
4. Reload the UI in game with /reload, then use /skt.

The folder inside AddOns should be named exactly:
SkinningTracker
